title: Dreadmod
description: A mod that adds the Dread and a few things to go with it. this include the Drendigo, dread wood, new weapons, armor, and more
body: Embark on an unforgettable adventure with a one-of-a-kind mod that introduces a wealth of new content to your game! Face off against the formidable Drendigo, a challenging boss lurking in the ominous Deep Dread. Explore the mysterious Deep Dread, a haunting new dimension teeming with secrets. Equip yourself with four unique sets of tools and armor, and wield powerful, custom-crafted swords with extraordinary abilities. Uncover intricate new structures, each offering its own dangers and rewards.
